programme.title: No Other Woman
programme.desc: A woman (Cristine Reyes) discovers that her husband (Derek Ramsay) is having an affair with a customer's daughter (Anne Curtis).

programme.title: My Illegal Wife
programme.desc: Clarice wants a husband and convinces a man with amnesia they are married when they become stranded on an island.

programme.title: Third World Happy
programme.desc: Wesley, a Filipino-American who left the Philippines to pursue better opportunities in the United States, goes back home to visit the wake of a departed loved one.

programme.title: I Think I'm in Love
programme.desc: Jonas, a womanizer, has a string of affairs with different young women. Tired of his lifestyle, his brother challenges him to be with a woman for three months without having any sexual contact.

programme.title: Once a Princess
programme.desc: Princess Erin played the heart of Leonard, the school geek, and seven years later, they cross paths and their roles reverse.

programme.title: Feel Na Feel
programme.desc: A young woman living with her parents finds herself in comical situations when two suitors and a pair of twin children enter her life.

programme.title: Tar-San
programme.desc: Tar and San are formally declared as future chiefs of the Agatao tribe. However, they find an enemy in Sabukot, who has his eyes on the throne himself.

programme.title: Kahit Isang Saglit
programme.desc: Young architects face many personal, professional and romantic challenges.

programme.title: Saka Saka
programme.desc: Two brothers, raised in a world of violence and politics as private assassins, have their bond on the line as their duty and principles collide.

programme.title: Ikaw Ang Lahat Sa Akin
programme.desc: A married couple buys an expensive house on mortgage. However, when the wife focuses on the new home, the husband starts an affair with another woman.

programme.title: Enteng en Mokong: Kaming mga mababaw ang kaligayahan
Ang Larawan
programme.desc: Candida and Paula Marasigan, the impoverished daughters of a renowned but reclusive painter, agonize over whether they should sell their late father's final masterpiece.

programme.title: Kahit Isang Saglit
programme.desc: Young architects face many personal, professional and romantic challenges.

programme.title: And I Love You So
programme.desc: A widow mourning her husband meets two interesting men.

programme.title: First Day High
programme.desc: When a college basketball team's water bottles are poisoned, the investigation centers on five freshmen, who come to learn more than they ever imagined about life, love and themselves.

programme.title: Ang Joker At Ang Pistolero
programme.desc: Two fraudsters try to dupe a big gambling syndicate. However, when the syndicate comes to know their real identities, they flee to save their lives.

programme.title: And Ai, Thank You!
programme.desc: A terminally ill comedy queen decides to make a difference and reward the people who have played a significant role in turning her into a star.

programme.title: Inday-Inday sa Balitaw
programme.desc: Inday endures many hardships after being abandoned by her mother. Although Inday tries to hate her mother, she feels drawn to her as they grow older.

programme.title: Tik Tak Toys: My Kolokotoys
programme.desc: Elvis and Presley unexpectedly become the toys of Bullet, a lonely, rich girl. When they realize they must bear the brunt of the girl's pranks, they leave, unaware that they captured the young girl's heart.

programme.title: Last Night
programme.desc: The results of the baccalaureate are full of surprises.

programme.title: Pinulot ka Lang sa Lupa
programme.desc: Angeli, a selfish and possessive girl, develops feelings for her guardian's son Efrain. However, Santina, a charming woman, also starts vying for his affections.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In the penultimate episode in the All Stars competition, the chefs are treated to a culinary dream trip to Parma, the legendary home of Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and Prosciutto di Parma ham. After getting a behind the scenes tour of some traditional multi-generational factories of these exclusive products, the chefs must feature these ingredients in two courses and serve their dishes to a table of 16 Michelin stars. Pasta master, Chef Evan Funke, sits in as the guest judge along with Tom, Padma, Gail and a bevy of celebrated Italian super-star chefs. One chef is eliminated as only the top three will move on to the finale.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Sunny has to perform for his old school teacher and mentor.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S2
programme.desc: A new wish leads Ruby to reunite a family.

programme.title: Crashbox S1
programme.desc: An outrageously insane new game show of puzzles and brainteasers for kids to play on television.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: It's been five years since Hiccup and Toothless successfully united dragons and vikings on the island of Berk.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: During a trip to the Lake of the Ozarks, Ben and Gwen squabble over Ben's 'half-birthday' celebration, but when Max gets word of a suspicious rockslide, the cousins must put aside their differences.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Left to entertain himself as Max takes a well-deserved nap, Ben stumbles upon a Xingo arcade game and goes OE-Shock Rock to power it up, but it, unfortunately, receives too much juice.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: While Gwen listens to a lecture on the Transcontinental Railroad, Ben sneaks away to the gift shop. When the Bounty Hunters appear and corner Ben, Gwen must use what she learnt to help him escape.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: As Max attempts to get Ben and Gwen to the Four Corners Monument before sunset, an ominous fog bank engulfs the roadway and forces Max to drive at a snail's pace.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After Ben gets too much publicity for his alien-antics in Fort Knox, a jealous Gwen feels unappreciated and looks to ease her pain with ice cream. She is soon confronted by Charmcaster.

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: Shnitzel is tired of adult jobs, and decides to act like a kid again.

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: Gazpacho and Chowder try to find a way to stand up to a customer.

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: When the gang caters an important sporting event, Mung and Truffles are at odds.

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: Chowder gets trapped in a block of ice when his brain freezes.

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: When Mung replaces their old snail car with a new one, Chowder can't handle the loss

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Philly Phil starts feeling like an outcast at Westley because of his poor performance in a Field Day event he transfers to a science magnet school. Missing their friend and feeling guilty for their role in making him feel unwanted the Westley kids have their work cut out for him when they try to woo him back. Meanwhile Luna is tired of being constantly upstaged by Sunny and vows to make the school think he's just as cool.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Class of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs. However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S2
programme.desc: Ruby’s latest wish vision appears to be missing an actual wish!

programme.title: We Bare Bears: The Movie
programme.desc: When the bears' love of food trucks and viral videos gets out of hand, the menacing Agent Trout from the National Wildlife Control pledges to restore the 'natural order' by separating them forever.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin
programme.desc: Tintin and his friends go on an exciting treasure hunt.

programme.title: Bel-Air S2
programme.desc: External dilemmas throw Carlton and Will off track and prevent them from fully preparing for the Founder's Award.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: A Superman who's driven by compassion and an inherent belief in the goodness of humankind.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. To win, all they’ll need to impress not only the judges - Tom, Padma, Gail and Nilou Motamed, but also culinary superstars Mauro Colagreco, Clare Smyth, Marcus Samuelsson, Janice Wong, Tony Mantuano, Eighth Generation Italian Butcher Dario Cecchini and Food & Wine magazine’s Hunter Lewis. It’s a fight to the bitter end, but only one will have their second chance to finally be crowned Top Chef.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.desc: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him

programme.desc: Carla lives and works in Mexicali, Mexico. After her brother is killed, she's forced to run. In the desert of Imperial Valley, she's now trapped in a deadly game between the CIA, government Informants, and the cartel.

programme.title: Exeter
programme.desc: During a party in an abandoned asylum, teenagers perform an occult ritual that leads to a violent possession

programme.title: In the Line of Duty 4
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop and two American cops are onto a suspected harbor worker and are forced to team up when they discover that the suspect is a witness on the run from the CIA

programme.title: The Last Full Measure
programme.desc: When a pentagon staffer investigate the posthumous petition to award Vietnam War hero William H. Pitsenbarger with the Medal of Honor, he discovers the truth behind its denial making him risk his own career to honor the late hero.

programme.title: Pee Nak 2
programme.desc: Though they've fulfilled their pledges, First and Balloon secretly leave monkhood to live secular lives , but soon return when a new spirit begins to terrorize them.

programme.title: Howling Village
programme.desc: After her brother goes missing, a young psychologist visits an infamous haunted and cursed location known as 'Howling Village' to investigate his disappearance and uncover her family's dark history.

programme.title: Thick As Thieves
programme.desc: On loan from Chicago mafia to Detroit underworld, a thief gets double-crossed by the Detroit boss, and, after barely escaping, vows to take revenge

programme.title: Winners and Sinners
programme.desc: Five parolees swear they will reform, while an underworld boss decides to reactivate his counterfeit money business

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: Extraordinarily large animals need extraordinary adaptations. From mighty whales to forest monsters, these are the epic survival stories of nature’s giants.

programme.title: The Rhino Orphanage
programme.desc: The poaching crisis intensifies and poachers turn their attention to orphanages. After losing her mother, four-week-old Jamila finally finds sanctuary at The Rhino Orphanage.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Spring comes to the Dales and North York Moors National Parks, the season when the parks' animals must find food, a mate and raise a family.

programme.title: Yorkshire: A Year in the Wild
programme.desc: Unseasonably cold summer weather causes difficulties for several animals in the Yorkshire Dales and North York Moors, including an injured roe deer and her twins.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: It is the home stretch with just one more country on Manu's list. America offers amazing food experiences on his final leg of his adventure. Around the world. Thirty days. $20,000 to spend. Will Manu achieve his dream?

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s first stop on his food trail of South Africa is the bustling city of Cape Town. Here, he visits a lively farmers market and cooks up a Cape Malay Curry in Bo Kaap.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren continues his food trail along South Africa’s Cape Coast, stopping off at the township of Khayelitsha, home to some inspiring micro-farming initiatives, before arriving at Grootbos Private Nature Reserve.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren heads to the Cape Winelands, where he tastes a variety of local wines including Pinotage, a signature South African red, and Ratafia, a unique and complex fortified wine.

programme.title: Food Trail: South Africa
programme.desc: Warren’s next stop on his food trail is Tswalu Nature Reserve, in the heart of the Kalahari Desert. Warren then meets with acclaimed Chef Marnus to cook up some exciting South African delicacies.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Julia Roberts’ Pretty Woman costume designer Marilyn Vance, Michael Collins producer Stephen Woolley, The Hollywood Reporter’s Scott Feinberg, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Hanks’ Captain Phillips producer Dana Brunetti, A League Of Their Own producer Elliot Abbott, friend and actor George Maguire, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Whitney Houston’s The Bodyguard director Mick Jackson, musician Wayne Linsey, The Preacher’s Wife producer Elliot Abbott, plus many more.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, the Zoo welcomes two crocodiles to the Swamp Forest, the new South East Asia habitat opens and the team prepare for the birth of a baby southern white rhino.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: Auckland Zoo’s primate team prepare to welcome a new birth.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Naledi: A Baby Elephant's Tale
programme.desc: Naledi follows the journey of a baby elephant orphaned in a rescue camp, as the man tasked with her survival races to protect an entire species while fighting to save her life.

programme.title: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: Immerse yourself in the drama of the 'Son of Sam' murders, presented the way the events were covered at the time.

programme.title: Edge of Existence
programme.desc: Edge of Existence examines existential threats to the worlds biosphere and what it means for the future of the planet, and Aotearoa.

programme.title: Edge of Existence
programme.desc: Edge of Existence explores a future where bio-threats present one of the greatest existential risks that humanity has ever faced. From viruses to man-made pandemics and synthetic bio-weapons, technology is accelerating the risks of man-made threats.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: Journey from the fashion capital to Milan, across the great canals of Venice to the otherworldly peaks of the Dolomites and the colorful coast of Cinque Terre to discover Northern Italy like never before - from the air.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: They come in all shapes and sizes, are home to terrifying volcanoes, magnificent ancient civilizations, and some of the bluest waters on Earth. These are the fascinating worlds of Italy's Islands.

programme.title: Australian Story - Episode 13
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks - Bathers Way
programme.desc: Gina Chick strides down Bathers Way in Newcastle on a stunning coastal walk that reflects how this harbour city, home to shipwrecks and Silverchair, has reinvented itself.

programme.title: Dreaming Big - Episode 1
programme.desc: Brothers and rivals Landen and Kaiden Smales, and Meg Day take on powerful swells at the Australian Indigenous Surfing Titles in Bells Beach, and master the waves in their own backyard.

programme.title: Gardening Australia - Autumn: Iconic Foliage Garden & Begonias 101
programme.desc: Costa visits a lush historic garden, Sophie joins volunteers rescuing fruit from waste, Jerry shares his begonia expertise, Millie creates a mini crevice garden, and we meet an ecologist restoring Tasmania's Midlands.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 13
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 16
programme.desc: Chas and John discuss the events of the week after President Trump's Trip to China to meet with Xi Jinping. What does it mean for the global economy, security and relations between the two superpowers?

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 99
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice - Matilda Brown
programme.desc: Actor and filmmaker Matilda Brown visits Alice and they make pork sausages, while Alice's job is to convince Matilda that chickpeas aren't all bad.

programme.title: Dr Ann's Secret Lives - Orangutans
programme.desc: Dr Ann Jones ventures into the heart of Borneo's jungle to look for wild orangutan, following a team of dedicated scientists whose work is leading to new insights into one of the world's most intelligent & elusive great apes.

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 139
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 78
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Aralin ang pagpapantig, pagbibigay ng kahulugan sa mga salita, pagbuo ng mga pangungusap, pagbabasa ng teksto, at kung ano ang mga pang-ukol, pang-abay, at salitang kilos.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Understand more about time, standard measures of length, mass and capacity and area through square-tile units, alongside pictographs with and without scales.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Identify pronouns and prepositions, and how to read, match, and write words that use short vowels.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Pahalagahan ang kagalingang pansibiko bilang pakikibahagi sa mga layunin ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, at iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento, at kung paano magsulat ng kuwento at magbigay ng kahulugan ng mga salita.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Know how to convert time, what are the linear, mass and capacity measures, the area of square and rectangle, bar graphs, and outcomes of an event.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Learn more about adjectives, adverbs, maps, graphs, how to read words, and how to restate facts from texts.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang mga gawaing pangkabuhayan at bahaging ginagampanan ng pamahalaan at ang mga kasapi nito, mga pinuno at iba pang naglilingkod tungo sa pagkakaisa, kaayusan at kaunlaran ng mga lalawigan sa kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Find out more about people, animals, plants, landforms and bodies of water, and their importance. Discover the types and effects of weather as they relate to daily activities, health and safety, and the natural objects in the sky affect one’s daily activities.

programme.title: Grade 5 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magbigay ng mga mahalagang pangyayari, paksa, at opinyon tungkol sa napakinggan o nabasang teksto, kung paano wastong magbaybay ng mga salita at maglarawan ng tagpuan at tauhan.

programme.title: Grade 5 Math
programme.desc: Learn more about area, volume, temperature, line graphs, and experimental probability.

programme.title: Grade 5 English
programme.desc: Analyze visual and multimedia elements and learn how to write paragraphs and articles.

programme.title: Grade 5 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang bahaging ginampanan ng kolonyalismong Espanyol at pandaigdigang koteksto ng reporma sa pag-usbong ng kamalayang pambansa patungo sa pagkabuo ng Pilipinas bilang isang nasyon.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science
programme.desc: Know how weathering and soil erosion shape the Earth’s surface and affect living things and the environment, weather disturbances and their effects, the phases of the Moon, the beliefs and practices associated with it, and the constellations with the information derived from their location in the sky.

programme.title: Grade 8 Filipino
programme.desc: Suriin ang iba't ibang akda ayon sa mga elemento nito, paano magpahayag ng sariling paniniwala, at kung ano ang malikhaing pagsusulat.

programme.title: Grade 8 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of inequalities in a triangle, parallel and perpendicular lines, and probability.

programme.title: Grade 8 English
programme.desc: Know more about different sources of information, grammatical signals, communicating skills, and writing paragraphs.

programme.title: Grade 8 Araling Panlipunan

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn about the digestive system, its interactions with other body system, diseases resulting from nutrient deficiency and harmful substances, how cells divide to produce new cells, meiosis, species as a concept, and the one-way flow of energy and the cycling of materials in an ecosystem.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
